changes.value: Test in swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/files/write/mod.rs:379 panics with 'No such file or directory' error. The test calls unwrap() on a Result::Err(Os { code: 2, kind: NotFound }). Package: swissarmyhammer-tools. Rerun with: cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-tools --lib test_write_relative_path_acceptance
